name: Kherson Oblast (Ukraine)

colors.symbolism: the Dnipro river, the Black Sea, and the sky
purity and the central field of the arms

description: A horizontal triband — blue, white, blue — in proportions 1:2:1, charged near the hoist with the coat of arms of Kherson Oblast.
history: Adopted on 25 October 2001 by Resolution No. 440 of the Kherson Oblast Council. Kherson is a steppe and Black-Sea region on the lower Dnipro.
